questionHtml:
Which molecule has the weakest nitrogen to nitrogen bond?


A.  N2

B.  N2H2

C.  N2H4

D.

meta.title: Which molecule has the weakest nitrogen to nitrogen bond? A. N2 B. N2H2 C. N2H4 D.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
Structure 2.2.2—Single, double and triple bonds involve one, two and three shared pairs of electrons respectively. Explain the relationship between the number of bonds, bond length and bond strength.
